A

Adds a new inventory item to the database.

Adds a new menu item to the database.

Calculates the total price of items in the cart.

D

Database - Class in com.teamMatcha.pos
Handles all database operations for the Boba Shop POS system.
Database() - Constructor for class com.teamMatcha.pos.Database
 
Database.InventoryUsageRow - Class in com.teamMatcha.pos
Represents a row in the inventory usage report.
Database.MenuIngredientRow - Class in com.teamMatcha.pos
Represents an ingredient for a menu item.
Database.PopularItemRow - Class in com.teamMatcha.pos
Represents a row in the popular items report.
Database.SalesReportRow - Class in com.teamMatcha.pos
Represents a row in the sales report.
Database.StockLevelRow - Class in com.teamMatcha.pos
Represents a row in the stock level report.
Database.WeeklyOrdersRow - Class in com.teamMatcha.pos
Represents a row in the weekly orders report.
Database.ZReportData - Class in com.teamMatcha.pos
Represents the data for a full Z-Report.
Database.ZReportRow - Class in com.teamMatcha.pos
Represents a row in the Z-Report (employee orders summary).
deleteEmployee(int) - Static method in class com.teamMatcha.pos.Database
Deletes an employee from the database.
deleteInventoryItem(int) - Static method in class com.teamMatcha.pos.Database
Deletes an inventory item from the database.
deleteMenuItem(int) - Static method in class com.teamMatcha.pos.Database
Deletes a menu item from the database.

Retrieves all employees from the database.
